title: Syz's RPG Mobs
description: This is an ambitious mod that aims to liven up your Minecraft world! Mobs of all shapes, types and sizes will roam your world day and night.
body:
![Syz's RPG Mobs Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c39830f5671d2d05a22709e59e1d67ef1679060d_0.webp)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/DVUewdim?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/syzs-rpg-mobs)
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-gray?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/syzs-rpg-mobs)
![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client_&_Server-purple)

# IMPORTANT‼️
Development will slow way down as I have other academic commitments. I notice all the downloads this mod gets and I am eternally grateful! I love this project and I will continue it when I have bursts of free time. Thank you!!

# ⚔️ Mobs & Equipment!

This mod aims to liven up your Minecraft world! Rather than more monsters roaming at night, you will have to stay on your toes during daylight hours as well. Many different mobs of different hostiliies will be added. **Each mob will have it's own unique abilities and/or move-sets, and will be complete with it's own unique animations.** Many of the features of this mod are inspired by other games and books!

This mod is configureable.

This mod is a passion project and is very much still in active development!

Check the issues section of this page for known issues and updates in progress!

**Also, please look at the important info at the bottom of this page!!**

# 🪲 Known Issues & Prospective Updates

*These will come in unknown future updates*
- Different textures for the Crystalline Magmite depending on which biome it spawns in (ie. snowy texture for snowy biomes & sandstone texture for desert biomes)

**Please report any issues to GitHub so they can be fixed!!!**

# 🔎 Important Info!

This mod will only be kept up-to-date on 1.20.1 as well as the final xx.xx version. For example, 1.21.11 was the last version from 1.21, therefore 1.21.11 will be supported until 26.1 releases its final version.

My current priority is adding content to this mod, though I will try as best I can to quickly port to the stated versions.

**This mod will most likely not be ported to other mod loaders**
